About Kim Arnold

Helping organizations make sense of complexity.

Kim Arnold is an enterprise transformation and business operations executive with 25+ years across technology, customer success, people, culture, communications, PMO, governance, and executive operations.

Founder
Kim Arnold

Enterprise Transformation & Business Operations Executive

Former Dell Technologies leader in the SVP office for a 3,000+ person global Customer Success organization, responsible for People, Culture, and Communications.

Connect on LinkedIn

The Executive Behind the Practice

I have spent my career helping organizations navigate complexity.

My career has never been about technology alone. It has been about helping people, processes, systems, and leadership move together when the business is changing around them.

I started by learning how to translate between technical and non-technical teams. That skill became the throughline of my career: translating complexity into clarity, strategy into execution, and organizational noise into operating systems leaders can actually run.

At Dell Technologies, I spent 17 years inside one of the most dynamic enterprise technology environments in the world, helping scale global services organizations, customer-facing operating models, governance frameworks, and executive communication systems. At Stratascale and Zones, I led transformation, PMO, customer operations, workforce planning, and AI-enabled operations work through fast-moving change.

What Kim bringsEnterprise operating experience across business operations, Customer Success, PMO, HR, executive communications, and transformation.
How she worksEmbedded with leaders, practical in execution, direct about what is broken, and focused on building systems that last.
Why it mattersOrganizations do not need more noise. They need clarity, structure, trust, and a path forward.
